name: Joe's Ice Cream Dessert
recipeIngredient: 1 pound chocolate cream-filled sandwich cookies, divided
4 chocolate toffee candy bars (1.4 oz each), divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the melted butter and half of the crushed cookie crumbs; press into a greased 13-in. x 9-in. x 2-in. pan.
2. Carefully spread the softened vanilla ice cream over the crust.
3. Combine the remaining crushed candy bars with the rest of the cookie crumbs, then sprinkle over the vanilla ice cream.
4. Carefully spread the softened chocolate ice cream over the top.
5. Sprinkle the remaining crushed candy bars on top.
6. Cover and freeze until firm, 6 hours or overnight.
Yield: 12-16 servings
